fields.description:
Evaluate every TODO, FIXME, HACK, WORKAROUND, and REVIEW-DEFENSE comment in the plugin codebase. For each: determine if it is still relevant, resolve it if possible, or create a tracking ticket if it requires separate work. This is a current-state remediation epic, not a tracking system.

Scope: 40 TODO-family comments (18 TODO, 12 FIXME, 6 HACK, 4 WORKAROUND) and 49 REVIEW-DEFENSE code comments across plugins/dso/scripts/, plugins/dso/hooks/, and tests/. Needs /dso:brainstorm before implementation to define success criteria.
